transfertAeroport.title: Private transfers to all airports and train stations
transfertAeroport.subtitle: Enjoy a stress-free transfer to or from airports (CDG, Orly, Lille, Brussels) and train stations. Fixed and transparent prices.
transfertAeroport.adv_custom_desc: Your wishes, your journey. Enjoy an unmatched transport experience designed around your preferences.
transfertAeroport.adv_punctuality_desc: Our drivers always arrive early to ensure your total peace of mind and a serene departure.
transfertAeroport.adv_support_desc: Your peace of mind is our commitment. Our team is at your service around the clock.

transfertSimple.title:
City Transfer
Tailored for You
transfertSimple.subtitle: Door to door, anywhere in the region. Your private chauffeur accompanies you with punctuality and discretion.
transfertSimple.adv_flexible_desc: We adapt to your exact address, schedule and travel preferences.
transfertSimple.adv_punctual_desc: Your chauffeur arrives 10 minutes early, in all circumstances.
transfertSimple.adv_secure_desc: Premium vehicles, regular maintenance and smooth driving for a peaceful journey.
transfertSimple.adv_comfort_desc: Water, charger, air conditioning — every detail is designed for your well-being.

transfertSimple.cta_subtitle: Book now and travel with peace of mind.
